message:
fix(multi): H2 connection close race, combinator completion safety, gRPC frame validation, QUIC stream cleanup, deadline tests, and 15 other targeted fixes

src/http/h2/connection.rs:
- Add graceful shutdown guard: track pending GOAWAY and refuse new
  streams during the drain phase to prevent races between shutdown
  and stream creation

src/combinator/{hedge,join,quorum,timeout}.rs:
- Hedge: simplify completion guard into inline check
- Join: add explicit tracking of which branches completed to prevent
  double-poll on already-finished branches
- Quorum: add completed count tracking for early-exit safety
- Timeout: add deadline-reached check before inner poll to prevent
  stale timeout results

src/channel/mpsc.rs:
- Add capacity-reporting method and pending-count accessor for
  diagnostics and testing

src/channel/fault.rs:
- Minor refactor: consolidate duplicate/reorder probability check

src/database/postgres.rs:
- Add connection parameter validation for host/port/dbname before
  attempting connection, providing structured errors early

src/grpc/{codec,interceptor,mod,protobuf}.rs:
- Codec: fix frame length bounds check
- Interceptor: add request metadata validation
- Mod: add re-exports for new validation types
- Protobuf: add message size limit enforcement with configurable
  max and structured error on overflow

src/http/body.rs:
- Minor type annotation cleanup

src/io/lines.rs:
- Add bare-LF handling tests for lines reader edge cases

src/lab/oracle/mod.rs:
- Minor formatting fix in oracle report

src/messaging/nats.rs:
- Add connection state validation before publish/subscribe

src/net/quic_native/streams.rs:
- Add stream table cleanup on connection close to prevent zombie
  stream state after QUIC connection termination

src/process.rs:
- Minor formatting fix

src/runtime/deadline_monitor.rs:
- Add deadline precision test

src/time/deadline.rs:
- Add deadline arithmetic tests: saturating add/sub, ordering,
  elapsed computation, zero-duration edge cases

src/time/intrusive_wheel.rs:
- Refactor timer slot computation for clarity

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
